scripts.dev:observability: pnpm observability:up && trap 'pnpm observability:down' EXIT INT TERM; pnpm dev
scripts.dev:langgraph-agent-api: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; [ ! -f .env.local ] || . ./.env.local; set +a; LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL=${LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL:-openai/gpt-5-mini}; export LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL; cd apps/langgraph-agent-api && uv run langgraph dev --no-browser --no-reload --port 2024
scripts.dev:langgraph-agent-fastapi-api: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; [ ! -f .env.local ] || . ./.env.local; set +a; LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL=${LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL:-openai/gpt-5-mini}; export LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL; cd apps/langgraph-agent-api && uv run uvicorn app:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 2024
scripts.dev:langgraph-agent-web: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; [ ! -f .env.local ] || . ./.env.local; set +a; LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL=${LANGGRAPH_AGENT_MODEL:-openai/gpt-5-mini} LANGGRAPH_AGENT_API_URL=http://localhost:2024 LANGGRAPH_AGENT_ASSISTANT_ID=agent pnpm --dir apps/web dev
scripts.registry:build: pnpm registry:sync:check && pnpm registry:catalog:check && pnpm registry:generate && node scripts/registry/export-public-registry.mjs --clean-output && pnpm --dir packages/ui exec shadcn build registry.json -o apps/web/public/r -c ../.. && pnpm registry:public:format
scripts.registry:check: pnpm registry:sync:check && pnpm registry:catalog:check && node scripts/registry/export-public-registry.mjs --check && pnpm registry:public:check
scripts.registry:validate: pnpm registry:sync:check && pnpm registry:catalog:check && pnpm registry:generate && pnpm --dir packages/ui exec shadcn registry validate registry.json -c ../..
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --dir apps/web test:unit && node --test scripts/registry-sync/registry-projection.test.mjs scripts/observability/keys.test.mjs scripts/observability/worktree-stack.test.mjs && pnpm registry:catalog:check
